name: Pumpernickel Bread (Machine) - Large Loaf
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 t Yeast, fast rise or machine
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients to the bread machine in the order specified for your model.
2. Select the "Dark Bread" setting and start the machine.
3. Once the kneading cycle is complete, remove the dough from the machine.
4. Place the dough on a lightly floured surface and perform one extra knead by hand.
5. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it in a greased baking dish.
6. Cover and let rise until doubled in size (about 1 hour).
7. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C) and bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Remove from oven, slice, and serve with smoked salmon, cream cheese, and other accompaniments.
